subject: [PATCH 07/14] sunrpc: add a generic netlink family for cache upcalls

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the implementation of sunrpc_cache_notify() and suggested using a more generic approach to handle cache notifications.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a generic netlink family for cache upcalls in the sunrpc module, addressing the limitation of existing caches living within the module. It defines a YAML spec and implements the necessary code to support cache notifications.
